title: Create HTML shell
validation_commands: python3 -B -c "from pathlib import Path; missing=[p for p in ['frontend/index.html'] if not Path(p).is_file()]; assert not missing, missing"
python3 -B -c "from pathlib import Path; text=Path('frontend/index.html').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert '<main' in text, '<main'"

goal: Create the second UI artifact after the shell exists.
title: Create UI behavior
validation_commands: python3 -B -c "from pathlib import Path; missing=[p for p in ['frontend/app.js'] if not Path(p).is_file()]; assert not missing, missing"
python3 -B -c "from pathlib import Path; text=Path('frontend/app.js').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert 'renderItems' in text, 'renderItems'"

goal: Create the third UI artifact after behavior exists.
title: Create UI styles
validation_commands: python3 -B -c "from pathlib import Path; missing=[p for p in ['frontend/styles.css'] if not Path(p).is_file()]; assert not missing, missing"
python3 -B -c "from pathlib import Path; text=Path('frontend/styles.css').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert '.item' in text, '.item'"
